title: The Emperor's Strategy
titleNative: 帝王攻略
synopsis: As part of the imperial family, every move by Chu Yuan in this game of chess is made with apprehension, fearing that with a moment of inattentiveness, the whole match will be lost in a single move. Ascending to the throne at eighteen, not half a year passes before civil strife erupts in Yun Nan. Though the thoughts of the old guard at the imperial court are not exactly identical, they are all waiting to see how the new emperor will put an end to this. (Source: WeTV)

title: Nadia: The Secret of Blue Water - The Motion Picture

titleEnglish: Nadia: The Secret of Blue Water - The Motion Picture
titleNative: ふしぎの海のナディア 劇場用オリジナル版
synonyms: Fushigi no Umi no Nadia Gekijou you Original Han
Nadia: The Secret of Blue Water - The Secret of Fuzzy
synopsis: Three years after the defeat of Gargoyle and Neo-Atlantis, a new threat has surfaced bent on bringing the world under his control. Geiger, using advanced robot technology, is attempting to begin a world war, and take control of the devistated world after the destruction has stopped. Once again, Nadia and Jean must fight to save the world, only this time from itself. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The King of Pigs
titleNative: 돼지의 왕
synopsis: After his business goes bankrupt, 30 something Kyung-Min (Oh Jung-Se) kills his wife impulsively. Hiding his anger, he seeks out his former middle school classmate Jong-Suk (Yang Ik-June). Jong-Suk now works as a ghostwriter for an autobiography, but he dreams of writing his own novel. For the first time in 15 years they meet. Kyung-Min and Jong-Suk both hide their own current situations and begin to talk about their middle school days. At their middle school, they were classified by their wealth and grades. Kyung-Min and Jong-Suk were at the bottom. They were called pigs. They were bullied by a ruling class called dogs. When they were called pigs they got angry, but couldn't do anything against the dogs. Then a king of pigs appears - Chul (Kim Hye-Na). Kyung-Min and Jong-Suk became to rely on Chul-Yi. Now, leading Jong-Suk to their middle school grounds, Kyung-Min discloses the shocking truth to Jong-Suk of what happened 15 years ago. (Source: Asian Media Wiki)

title: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleRomaji: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleNative: ＨＵＧっと！プリキュア♡ふたりはプリキュア オールスターズメモリーズ
synonyms: Hugtto! Pretty Cure x Futari wa Pretty Cure Movie: All Stars Memories
synopsis: Celebrating the 15th anniversary of the Precure franchise, and the eleventh Precure All Stars crossover film. A mysterious monster named Miden has appeared, stealing away the Precures' memories and reverting them to the state of a small child. The HUGtto! Precure team joins forces with the Futari wa Precure team to retrieve the stolen memories and powers of every other Precure team so far!

title: Captain Harlock: Arcadia of my Youth - Endless Orbit SSX
titleRomaji: Waga Seishun no Arcadia: Mugen Kidou SSX
titleEnglish: Captain Harlock: Arcadia of my Youth - Endless Orbit SSX
titleNative: わが青春のアルカディア・無限軌道ＳＳＸ
synonyms: Arcadia of My Youth: Endless Orbit SSX
Arcadia of My Youth: Infinite Course SSX
synopsis: At the end of Arcadia of My Youth Capitain Harlock and the crew of the space ship Arcadia had been banished from Earth. The Earth, as well as many other planets in the universe had been taken over by the Illumidus, a race of destructive humanoids who ruin, enslave or destroy almost any inhabitable planet they come across. In "Endless Orbit SSX" Harlock battles the Illumidus while searching for a mythical "Planet of Peace" where all the peoples of the universe can live freely and without war. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
titleRomaji: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
titleNative: 悪魔の花嫁 蘭の組曲
synonyms: Akuma no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
synopsis: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku revolves around high school girl, Minako Ifu, who has become the focus of the attentions of Deimos, former god of terror. For the forbidden love between him and his younger twin sister, Venus, the former goddess of love, he was turned into a demon by Zeus, and she was imprisoned in the Swamp of Death. In order to rescue Venus from her fatal punishment, he has to bring Minako, who appears to be her physical reincarnation, to the underworld so she can possess her body. Adapting a chapter of the manga, this OVA is centered on Minako visiting the mansion of an infamous botanist in search and investigation of her missing friend.

title: Perrine Monogatari
titleNative: ペリーヌ物語
synopsis: Perrine is a young girl who lives in Bosnia with her Indian mother and beloved father – that is, until her father passes away, leaving her mother with a single wish: travel to France to be with his father. The over 1,000 kilometer journey seems unfathomable, but Perrine and her mother have a plan: they will photograph people in the towns along the way to support themselves. With their hardy donkey Palikare and faithful dog Baron, the two set forth for Paris; along the way they encounter kind souls, barren villages, and a number of hardships; will Perrine and her mother survive the long journey to France?

title: City Hunter The Movie: Angel Dust
titleEnglish: City Hunter The Movie: Angel Dust
titleNative: シティーハンター 天使の涙(エンジェルダスト)
synonyms: シティーハンター エンジェルダスト
synopsis: A movie project to commemorate the 35th anniversary of the City Hunter TV anime. Ryou Saeba is known as City Hunter, the top 'sweeper' within the underworld. Based in Shinjuku as a private detective, he and his partner Kaoru Makimura take on a variety of clients. Their latest case is provided by Angie, a filmmaker, with a simple request - to find her missing cat. Ryou is thrilled by Angie's beautiful looks while Kaori is thrilled by the hefty reward... Meanwhile, Saeko Nogami of the Metropolitan Police investigates an invention of the biotech company Zoltech - a dark technology that turns soldiers on the battlefield into superhumans. Created at the request of a mysterious underworld organization, this invention is the newest version of Angel Dust, which once almost destroyed Ryou and sent his partner Hideyuki Makimura to his death. Can these two cases possibly be linked? There's clearly more to Angie's request than she's willing to share, and the truth around Angel Dust is about to lau

title: Irresponsible Captain Tylor OVA
titleNative: 無責任艦長タイラー OVA
synopsis: Six long months have passed. The Raalgon Empire has developed a horrible new type of weapon, and Tylor has been charged with the duty of intercepting it as it is being transported. But when all that could go wrong does go wrong, the crew members of the Soyokaze find themselves at the mercy of their enemies. As the hours tick down toward their execution, the crew wonders: has their irresponsible captain misled them? Or is this all a part of some greater strategy? (Source: RightStuf)

title: Legends of the Dark King: A Fist of the North Star Story
titleRomaji: Hokuto no Ken: Raoh Gaiden Ten no Haoh
titleEnglish: Legends of the Dark King: A Fist of the North Star Story
titleNative: 北斗の拳 ラオウ外伝 天の覇王
synonyms: Ten no Haou: Hokuto no Ken Raou Gaiden
Fist of the North Star: Legends of the Dark King – La historia alterna
synopsis: In the wastelands following the great nuclear war, a legend grew of a man. “Hokuto No Ken.” The Fist of the North Star. Master of a legendary fighting technique. A man of impossible strength and endurance. Yet before Ken claimed the title of the Fist, there was another master, trained in the art of Hokuto Shinken, the King of the Fist, the Divine Fist of Heaven. Raoh: the ultimate assassin, the ultimate warrior. This is the story of the world before Fist of the North Star, and how one man took the future of a savage world into his deadly hands and reshaped its destiny. Not as a hero but as a conqueror. For in the mind of the man called Raoh, the only way to save Mankind is to grind it under his giant heel! The greatest battle is about to begin in Legends of the Dark King ~ Fist of the North Star! (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Mobile Suit Gundam Wing: Operation Meteor
titleRomaji: Shin Kidou Senki Gundam Wing: Operation Meteor - ODD＆EVEN NUMBERS
titleEnglish: Mobile Suit Gundam Wing: Operation Meteor
titleNative: 新機動戦記ガンダムＷ オペレーション・メテオ ODD＆EVEN NUMBERS
synonyms: New Mobile Report Gundam Wing: Operation Meteor
synopsis: Two video releases recapping events from the Gundam Wing TV series. Each Operation Meteor video contains an 'Odd' episode and an 'Even' episode. The 'Odd' episodes feature Heero, Trowa and Wufei, while the 'Even' episodes feature Duo and Quatre. The episodes also featured brief new footages of the characters after the final episode of the TV series. (Source: AniDB)

title: ONE PIECE: Cry heart
titleNative: ワンピース Cry heart
synopsis: Three five-minute stop-motion animated shorts by Banpresto that recreate the famous scenes from Eiichiro Oda's manga and anime One Piece. Unlike most figures, Banpresto's "Cry heart" figures are deliberately designed to encourage people to create their own stop-motion shorts. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: NITABOH: Tsugaru Shamisen Shiso Gaibun
titleNative: NITABOH 仁太坊―津軽三味線始祖外聞
synopsis: At a young age, Nitaroh is stricken with an illness that leaves him blind. He inherits the shamisen guitar once used by his mother and is taught its basics by a blind travelling shamisen player. In time with the help of friends old and new, he walks the paths that leads to his ultimate fate - that of founder of the Tsugaru style of shamisen play. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Space Battleship Yamato
titleNative: 宇宙戦艦ヤマト
synopsis: In the distant future, the war between the human race and the Gamilon has taken its toll on the planet Earth. Constant bombardment of radioactive asteroids has rendered the planet's atmosphere uninhabitable. As a means of relief aid, Queen Starsha of the planet Iscandar offers the Earth Forces a device that can completely neutalize the radiation off the planet. For this task, the space battleship Yamato is launched from the remains of its World War II ancestor on a 148,000 light-year journey. However, the crew of the Yamato has only one Earth year to travel to Iscandar and back, or the human race will come to an end. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Acrobatics
tags.description: The art of jumping, tumbling, and balancing. Often paired with trapeze, trampolining, tightropes, or general gymnastics.

title: Tsuki no Sango
titleNative: 月の珊瑚
synopsis: The story takes place in approximately the year 3000, when humankind arrived at the peak of its civilization, but is losing its will to keep living. It follows a girl, called "princess" by those around her, who lives on a small island with a fifty-person colony and a shining coral reef. She is a descendant of the Moon people, and the story focuses on how her ancestors supposedly came to Earth.

tags.name: Space
tags.description: Partly or completely set in outer space.

tags.name: Coastal
tags.description: Story prominently takes place near the beach or around a coastal area/town. Setting is near the ocean.

tags.name: Post-Apocalyptic
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a world or civilization after a global disaster.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Advertisement
tags.description: Produced in order to promote the products of a certain company.

tags.name: Writing
tags.description: Centers around the profession of writing books or novels.

title: Thunderbolt Fantasy Sword Seekers 2
titleNative: Thunderbolt Fantasy: 東離劍遊紀 2
synonyms: Thunderbolt Fantasy: Sword Travels from the East 2
synopsis: The second season of Thunderbolt Fantasy.

tags.name: Puppetry
tags.description: Animation style involving the manipulation of puppets to act out scenes.

tags.name: Swordplay
tags.description: Prominently features the use of swords in combat.

tags.name: Foreign
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a country outside the country of origin.

tags.name: Wuxia
tags.description: Chinese fiction concerning the adventures of martial artists in Ancient China.

tags.name: Tragedy
tags.description: Centers around tragic events and unhappy endings.

tags.name: Samurai
tags.description: Prominently features warriors of medieval Japanese nobility bound by a code of honor.

tags.name: Desert
tags.description: Prominently features a desert environment.

tags.name: Philosophy
tags.description: Relating or devoted to the study of the fundamental nature of knowledge, reality, and existence.

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Anti-Hero
tags.description: Features a protagonist who lacks conventional heroic attributes and may be considered a borderline villain.

tags.name: Dragons
tags.description: Prominently features mythical reptiles which generally have wings and can breathe fire.

tags.name: Primarily Adult Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters above a high school age.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Tokusatsu
tags.description: Prominently features elements that resemble special effects in Japanese live-action shows

tags.name: Cultivation
tags.description: Features characters using training, often martial arts-related, and other special methods to cultivate qi (a component of traditional Chinese philosophy, described as "life force") and gain strength or immortality.

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

tags.name: Crime
tags.description: Centers around unlawful activities punishable by the state or other authority.

tags.name: Gore
tags.description: Prominently features graphic bloodshed and violence.

tags.name: Henshin
tags.description: Prominently features character or costume transformations which often grant special abilities.

tags.name: Fugitive
tags.description: Prominently features a character evading capture by an individual or organization.

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.
